visual_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on a man with long, dark, curly hair and a determined, intense expression. He is dressed in dark, layered clothing, including a leather-like jacket. He is surrounded by a large, shadowy crowd of people, all looking forward with serious and somber faces. The setting is extremely dark, with a cool, greenish light casting deep shadows. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera remains steady, emphasizing the man's commanding presence. The audio begins with a deep, weary sigh, suggesting a feeling of exhaustion or resignation. The scene cuts to a medium shot of a young man standing in a dimly lit stone corridor. He has short, dark hair and a look of shock and concern on his face. He is wearing a patterned sweater over a collared shirt. The background is dark and composed of stone archways, with a single light source illuminating him from above and behind. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner.
